text.title: Spring Async Examples
text.summary: Named executor config, @Async service method with CompletableFuture, and Awaitility-based test.

example.note: AsyncConfigurer wires the UncaughtExceptionHandler. Two named executors with separate pools.
Named executor, CompletableFuture return, exception logged and returned as failed future.
void return swallows exceptions. Unnamed @Async uses the default executor.
Awaitility.await() polls future::isDone — no Thread.sleep, no fixed delay.
